LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA AIR RESOURCES BOARD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. EVEN IF THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE GUIDELINES, THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED. BOTH THE COMPLAINT AND THE GUIDELINES SET FORTH A ROLE FOR DEFENDANT IN THE PROGRAM AND THE COMPLAINT ALLEGES THAT BURCH IS AN AGENT FOR BOTH. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT AND DAVID BURCH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER THE NEGLIGENCE CLAIM. PLAINTIFF HAS WITHDRAWN THE INVERSE CONDEMNATION CLAIM AGAINST BURCH. ON THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT, IT CANNOT BE DETERMINED WHETHER BURCH WAS ACTING IN AN ADMINISTRATIVE OR DISCRETIONARY CAPACITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT AND DAVID BURCH'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 1 AND THE IMMUNITY AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE BECAUSE DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT SHOWN THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT PROVE THAT BURCH'S NEGLIGENT ACTS CAUSED IT TO DESTROY THE ENGINES. A JURY COULD CONCLUDE THAT HE NEGLIGENTLY TOLD PLAINTIFF TO DESTROY THEM GIVEN THE CIRCUMSTANCES EXISTING AT THE TIME. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 BECAUSE THE ENGINES WERE NOT DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE PLANNED WORKINGS OF THE GOVERNMENT PROGRAM AS REQUIRED UNDER CUSTOMER COMPANY. PROPOSED ORDERS TO BE SUBMITTED ARE TO COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 437(C)G. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: DIANE CHEN CSR # 11312 301/PJB
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-03-2008 HELD AND CONTINUED TO SEP-05-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN 220. (D220)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Max L. Kelley of Cox Wooton, 438-4600, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA AIR RESOURCES BOARD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, 10 days to answer. Even if the Court takes judicial notice of the guidelines, the demurrer is overruled. Both the complaint and the guidelines set forth a role for defendant in the program and the complaint alleges that Burch is an agent for both. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Max L. Kelley of Cox Wooton, 438-4600, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Golnar J. Fozi, 858-755-5666, appearing for defendants and moving parties

This matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT and DAVID BURCH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, 10 days to answer the negligence claim. Plaintiff has withdrawn the inverse condemnation claim against Burch. On the face of the complaint, it cannot be determined whether Burch was acting in an administrative or discretionary capacity. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
